name: public-readiness
description: Stage-first read-only public-readiness checklist recipe: package/docs/test readiness assessment with concrete evidence and prioritized follow-ups for the runtime task.

tasks.prompt: Inspect package, README, license, distribution, and allowlist assumptions relevant to the runtime task. Do not modify files. Return PASS/FAIL/NEEDS ATTENTION checks with file-path evidence.

Inspect documentation, examples, recipes, and user-facing guidance relevant to the runtime task for consistency and stale claims. Do not modify files. Return stale/unclear/missing documentation findings with file-path evidence.
Inspect tests, fixtures, e2e coverage, package scripts, and validation gates relevant to the runtime task. Do not modify files. Return coverage gaps and recommended checks with file-path evidence.

stages.prompt: Using Source Stage Context and the runtime task, produce a public-readiness decision summary. Do not modify files. Return: Overall status, Must fix before public release, Should fix soon, Safe to defer, Evidence paths.
